title: ETF Market Making at National Bank
description:
QUARCC Speaker Series 

Ever wonder what goes into pricing and providing liquidity for ETFs at a major bank? 📊⚡
QUARCC is incredibly excited to welcome Rami Jrad for an exclusive guest speaker event! As an ETF Market Maker at National Bank, Rami knows exactly what it takes to build robust trading systems and navigate complex markets.
If you’re interested in the intersection of coding, data science, and finance, come hear Rami break down real-world market making strategies and get a firsthand look into the quant industry.
Bring your questions and get ready to level up your quant skills.
